description.en: Get posts from a Bluesky user's feed.
description.de: Beiträge aus dem Feed eines Bluesky-Benutzers abrufen.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:BLUESKY_ACCESS_TOKEN|Get your access token from Bluesky app settings

inputs.name: Actor

description.en: The handle or DID of the user (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').

inputs.bot: The Bluesky handle (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social') or DID (e.g., 'did:plc:xyz123') of the user whose feed to retrieve.

inputs.name: Limit

description.en: Maximum number of posts to return (default 25, max 100).

inputs.bot: Number of posts to return. Defaults to 25 if not specified. Maximum is 100.

success.en: Retrieved feed for the requested user.
